# MASTER ISSUE SUMMARY - 2026-05-03

**Generated by:** CTO Team (8 specialized agents)
**Date:** 2026-05-03

---

## CRITICAL ISSUES (Fix Immediately)

### 1. Hardcoded Supabase Credentials in adsqr
**Severity:** CRITICAL
**File:** `adsqr/src/lib/supabase.ts`
**Issue:** API keys exposed in source code
**Fix:** Move to environment variables

### 2. 7,188 console.log Statements
**Severity:** HIGH
**Files:** Throughout codebase
**Issue:** Leaks data in production
**Fix:** Replace with Winston logger

### 3. API Response Inconsistencies (47 issues)
**Severity:** HIGH
**Services:** All 15+ services
**Issue:** Frontend integration will fail
**Fix:** Standardize response format

### 4. Missing uncaughtException Handlers
**Severity:** CRITICAL
**Services:** rez-catalog-service, rez-search-service, rez-insights-service
**Issue:** Service crashes without logging
**Fix:** Add process error handlers
